summary: This document outlines the general medical process of differential diagnosis, detailing steps like symptom inquiry, history review, and physical exams. It includes a list of common symptoms such as abdominal pain and asthma alongside their potential differential conditions. The content appears to be standard public health educational material rather than proprietary internal strategy.
